conditions.notes: Cause of death. Had atrial fibrillation and hypertension; was reportedly not on anticoagulation.
Cause of death, 2025. Patient was his primary caregiver through his illness; relevant to her recent grief and her wariness of aggressive interventions.

summary: Notable for FATHER with atrial fibrillation + hypertension who died of an ISCHEMIC STROKE at 74, reportedly not anticoagulated — directly relevant to the patient's own AFib/stroke-risk discussion. Maternal type 2 diabetes and CHF. Brother with CAD + T2DM. No known inherited bleeding disorders.
